scenario: FR-045 (GOV-002) Stop-ordering state matrix. Correction 2: digest-mismatch precedence is ABSOLUTE across every outcome — a stale result (reviewed digest != current) can NEVER block, request a decision, report as actionable, or authorize a packet; it is superseded and routes to re-review (or wait, if a current-digest review is in flight). Only a terminal, clean, EXACT-current-digest result renders the packet + marker and is capturable.
note: The routing decision under test is a PURE function of (review_terminal, review_outcome, digest_matches_current, in_flight_present). No Stop-hook path or capture layer is exercised in this slice.

routing_fields.render_packet: render the six-section lifecycle boundary packet
routing_fields.launch_review: launch a NEW co-review at this Stop
routing_fields.action: the single instruction to the implementer
routing_fields.capturable_as_verdict: may the capture layer record this as a human authorization

matrix.why: a required review for the current digest is running: detect the single tracked in-flight run, wait/poll it, never a packet/marker/duplicate.
a second Stop while one review is in flight must NOT launch a second review; same wait/poll routing.
THE ONLY marker-carrying, capturable path: terminal + clean + exact current digest. The packet is bound to the accepted reviewed-tree digest.
actionable findings AT THE CURRENT DIGEST suppress the packet + marker; fix then re-review.
a mid-review human decision AT THE CURRENT DIGEST is a NARROW non-boundary question, no options, no marker.
a timeout / infra failure AT THE CURRENT DIGEST reports the SPECIFIC failure + retry/spend policy; never represented as clean.
a completed CLEAN review whose digest != current is SUPERSEDED — digest-clean is not enough, it must be the CURRENT digest; a fresh review of the current digest is needed.
ABSOLUTE PRECEDENCE: a stale actionable result must NOT block (never fix-and-re-review on an old tree); it is superseded — re-review the current digest.
ABSOLUTE PRECEDENCE: a stale result must NOT request a decision; it is superseded — re-review the current digest.
ABSOLUTE PRECEDENCE: a stale infra failure is superseded (no authoritative result for the current digest exists) — re-review the current digest.
an earlier-digest clean result while a current-digest review is still in flight is superseded; wait for the in-flight current-digest review, never capture the earlier one.

invariant: capturable_as_verdict is true for EXACTLY ONE state (clean-current-digest); render_marker implies capturable_as_verdict and both imply terminal AND clean AND digest_matches_current; a digest mismatch forces render_packet=render_marker=capturable=false for EVERY outcome; launch_review is never true on the Stop path.
